Anime.style: Japanese anime illustration, Studio Ghibli and Makoto Shinkai inspired
Anime.color: vibrant saturated pastel palette, bright cel-shaded colors, colorful gradient sky background
Anime.texture: clean flat cel shading, sharp specular highlights, smooth anime skin, large expressive eyes with detailed iris reflections
Anime.lighting: soft anime rim lighting, warm fill light, expressive cel-shaded shadows
Anime.description: Japanese anime illustration with expressive eyes, cel shading, and vibrant animation style.

Van Gogh.style: Vincent van Gogh post-impressionist oil painting, Starry Night style
Van Gogh.color: warm golden yellows, deep cobalt blues, emerald greens, swirling complementary color contrasts
Van Gogh.texture: thick impasto brushstrokes, visible paint ridges, swirling turbulent patterns, textured canvas weave
Van Gogh.lighting: dramatic directional warm candlelight, deep expressive shadows
Van Gogh.description: Impressionist oil painting with thick textured brush strokes, swirling patterns, and rich blue and yellow colors.

Neon.style: futuristic neon holographic artwork, synthwave aesthetic
Neon.color: electric magenta, cyan, and purple neon glows on near-black background, holographic iridescent reflections
Neon.texture: glossy synthetic skin, glowing neon light trails, holographic foil texture, chromatic aberration edges
Neon.lighting: intense neon rim lighting, glowing contour highlights, deep dark shadows with colored light spill
Neon.description: Futuristic neon artwork with glowing blue, pink, and purple lights, holographic reflections, and cyber aesthetics.

Pop Art.style: Andy Warhol pop art screen print, Roy Lichtenstein comic style
Pop Art.color: bold flat primary colors, red, yellow, cyan, magenta, high contrast black outlines, graphic color blocking
Pop Art.texture: halftone dot pattern, screen-print registration marks, flat graphic areas, bold ink outlines
Pop Art.lighting: flat even graphic lighting, no gradients, pure color fills
Pop Art.description: Andy Warhol-inspired artwork with bold outlines, halftone dots, bright contrasting colors, and graphic comic design.

Graffiti.style: urban street art graffiti mural, Banksy and wildstyle graffiti
Graffiti.color: vibrant spray-paint palette, orange, purple, teal, lime green, drip effects, bold black outline strokes
Graffiti.texture: spray-can aerosol texture, stencil cut edges, brick wall undertone, paint drips and splatter
Graffiti.lighting: urban outdoor daylight, harsh shadows, street atmosphere
Graffiti.description: Urban street art with spray paint textures, colorful murals, brick wall effects, and stencil painting.

Watercolor.style: expressive fine art watercolor painting on textured paper
Watercolor.color: soft translucent pastel washes, wet-on-wet color blooms, delicate pigment gradients
Watercolor.texture: watercolor paper grain, flowing pigment bleeds, soft brush edges, paint pooling and blooming
Watercolor.lighting: soft diffused natural window light, gentle luminous shadows
Watercolor.description: Soft watercolor painting with flowing pigments, artistic paper texture, and delicate brush blending.

Pencil Sketch.style: realistic graphite pencil sketch on white drawing paper
Pencil Sketch.color: monochrome black and white graphite tones, subtle warm paper tint
Pencil Sketch.texture: fine cross-hatching, pencil stroke direction following facial contours, paper tooth texture, smudged shading
Pencil Sketch.lighting: dramatic high contrast chiaroscuro, deep shadows, bright highlights
Pencil Sketch.description: Realistic graphite sketch with detailed pencil shading, monochrome drawing, and textured paper.

Cyberpunk.style: Cyberpunk 2077 sci-fi cinematic portrait, futuristic dystopian city
Cyberpunk.color: neon city colors, electric blue, hot pink, acid yellow, dark rainy atmosphere
Cyberpunk.texture: high-tech metallic implants, synthetic skin, holographic HUD overlays, rain-slicked surfaces
Cyberpunk.lighting: rainy neon city atmospheric lighting, colored light spill from signs, volumetric fog
Cyberpunk.description: Futuristic sci-fi portrait with neon lighting, holograms, advanced technology, and rainy city atmosphere.

Oil Painting.style: classical Renaissance oil painting, Rembrandt and Vermeer style
Oil Painting.color: rich deep earthy tones, warm ochres, burnt siennas, deep umbers, ivory highlights
Oil Painting.texture: traditional oil paint on canvas, visible brushwork, glazing layers, impasto highlights
Oil Painting.lighting: chiaroscuro dramatic lighting, single warm light source, deep velvety shadows
Oil Painting.description: Classical oil painting with realistic brushwork, rich canvas textures, dramatic lighting, and museum-quality artwork.

Comic Book.style: Marvel and DC comic book illustration, graphic novel art
Comic Book.color: bold vibrant primary colors, dynamic color contrasts, flat color fills with cel shading
Comic Book.texture: thick black ink outlines, halftone dot shading, dynamic action lines, inked crosshatching
Comic Book.lighting: flat dramatic panel lighting, strong rim light, graphic shadow shapes
Comic Book.description: Bold comic illustration with black ink outlines, dynamic shadows, graphic novel style, and vibrant comic colors.

Fantasy.style: epic high fantasy concept art, magical portrait painting
Fantasy.color: rich jewel tones, deep purples, emerald greens, gold accents, magical glowing particle effects
Fantasy.texture: detailed painterly digital art, magical energy aura, glowing runes, ethereal particle effects
Fantasy.lighting: ethereal magical rim lighting, mystical bioluminescent glow, cinematic epic atmosphere
Fantasy.description: Magical fantasy artwork with glowing effects, enchanted environments, mystical lighting, and epic cinematic atmosphere.

Clay Art.style: handmade clay sculpture, Claymation stop-motion animation style
Clay Art.color: warm matte pastel clay tones, terracotta, cream, soft blush, earthy pigments
Clay Art.texture: smooth clay surface, subtle fingerprint and tool marks, rounded soft edges, matte clay material
Clay Art.lighting: soft studio diffused lighting, gentle fill light, subtle clay surface sheen
Clay Art.description: Handmade clay sculpture appearance with realistic clay texture, rounded shapes, and studio lighting.

Pixel Art.style: retro 8-bit and 16-bit pixel art, arcade game sprite style
Pixel Art.color: limited retro arcade color palette, bright saturated pixel colors, dithering patterns
Pixel Art.texture: sharp square pixel grid, no anti-aliasing, visible pixel blocks, retro sprite shading
Pixel Art.lighting: flat 2D sprite lighting, simple highlight and shadow pixel blocks
Pixel Art.description: Retro 8-bit pixel artwork with colorful square pixels, arcade game aesthetics, and nostalgic digital style.

3D Cartoon.style: Pixar and DreamWorks 3D animated movie character, high-quality CGI render
3D Cartoon.color: bright cheerful stylized colors, smooth color gradients, subsurface skin scattering
3D Cartoon.texture: smooth 3D render, subsurface scattering skin, glossy eyes, soft cloth simulation
3D Cartoon.lighting: soft cinematic three-point studio lighting, ambient occlusion, movie-quality rendering
3D Cartoon.description: High-quality animated 3D character with smooth textures, expressive features, soft lighting, and movie-quality rendering.

Digital Painting.style: professional digital concept art, ArtStation and CGSociety masterpiece quality
Digital Painting.color: vibrant rich color palette, deep dramatic shadows, luminous highlights, cinematic color grading
Digital Painting.texture: smooth digital brush strokes, ultra-detailed skin pores, realistic hair strands, fabric weave
Digital Painting.lighting: cinematic three-point lighting, dramatic key light, colored rim light, professional studio setup
Digital Painting.description: Professional digital artwork with cinematic lighting, realistic brushwork, ultra-detailed textures, and concept art quality.

Low Poly Art.style: modern low poly geometric art, triangulated polygon mesh portrait
Low Poly Art.color: clean flat geometric color fills, vibrant gradient polygon faces, bold color contrasts
Low Poly Art.texture: triangulated polygon mesh surface, flat shaded facets, sharp angular edges, geometric abstraction
Low Poly Art.lighting: flat minimalist directional lighting, clean polygon shadow facets
Low Poly Art.description: Modern geometric artwork created from colorful polygon shapes with clean angular surfaces and vibrant gradients.
